---
format:
  typst:
    css-property-processing: translate
keep-typ: true
_quarto:
  tests:
    typst:
      ensureTypstFileRegexMatches:
        -
          - '\[#set text\(fill: rgb\(255, 0, 255\)\);\s*B\]'
        - []
---

```{=html}
<table>
    <tr><td>A</td><td style="color: magenta;">B</td></tr>
</table>
```
